summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShelterLink app modifications including provider registration with documents, login verification restrictions, forgot password functionality, cancel booking features, verificator document viewing, and UI language verification.
passed_tests: Provider registration with both ID document and police check fields
Provider login blocked (403) when not verified with clear error message
Verificator can see both ID document and Police Check for providers
Forgot password endpoint sends email with new random password
Forgot password UI in login page works correctly
Cancel booking endpoint exists and works for SEEKER role
Seeker login works normally without verification check
Provider login works after verification approval
All UI text appears to be in English
Document viewer modal opens and closes correctly
Police check upload field visible for provider registration
ID document upload field visible for provider registration

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - Most UI functionality working, minor navigation issues due to session management
